name: super-werewolves-skills
description: Dev workflow automation, hooks, and notifications for Gitea-hosted homelab repos.

plugins.name: sound-notifications
plugins.description: Plays system sounds when Claude needs input or finishes a task. Cross-platform: Termux, WSL, macOS, Linux.

plugins.name: productivity-hooks
plugins.description: Injects project context on every prompt, enforces AGENTS.md in subagents, sends Discord notifications on session end.
